textByHashes.fd9164de12c40e74b4dc49f5502bbb1df4bbdd88: Hello there. Did you see that dwarf by the big forge? I think he wanted to talk to you.
textByHashes.010224ebac05ca9f7a35068ed1dbee2446f8d98b: Hello! Look at this place. Isn't it amazing?
textByHashes.290467e7ef542a1367b3a6fd31ab67a2d3be3edf: So what can I do for you?
textByHashes.a88986dd1c9238d629e65926c9afa7be2b344cb9: A ruin within a ruin? How exciting! We have found the odd thing that doesn't seem to be dwarven in origin, but it's still early days for us here, so we haven't been able to learn much yet.
textByHashes.43c147b1c57f938dfd366958479a86db2ddefddf: One that was particularly interesting was this strange icon I found in the mine.
textByHashes.d74504f20245aa5859e9fad6f92e06abe90bf21b: Could be a lot more to find over there, but I must admit, I haven't been back since... well...
textByHashes.820ad8afc56d99249c9435ccfb4017b306aed1b4: It's probably nothing, but there's this big sinkhole on the other side of the mine. I'm probably just being silly, but I'm sure I heard a voice coming from inside.
textByHashes.d191eb22b1e8a62a8eafce750eeff171a31bb986: Go down the hole?! You're far braver than I am! There's plenty of rocks around there. I'm sure you could tie a rope to one of them. You'd need a pretty long rope though. Here, you can use mine.
textByHashes.5d7f0b09cf5aad1714b1afd01d6f2482a0f6a6dd: You'll find it just on the other side of the mine. You'll need a pretty long rope to get down there though. Here, you can use mine.
textByHashes.39d828f88d9fb63bb3fdb14c745543213113827e: You'll find it just on the other side of the mine. Be careful down there.
textByHashes.645f78ccae5156934d66dcc1bea77b642f06d949: Hello! Glad to see you're okay. I was worried you might have gone and got stuck down that hole.
